@foreach($groupedEndpoints as $group) <h1 id="{!! Str::slug($group['name']) !!}">{!! $group['name'] !!}</h1> {!! Parsedown::instance()->text($group['description']) !!} @foreach($group['subgroups'] as $subgroupName => $subgroup) @if($subgroupName !== "") <h2 id="{!! Str::slug($group['name']) !!}-{!! Str::slug($subgroupName) !!}">{{ $subgroupName }}</h2> @php($subgroupDescription = collect($subgroup)->first(fn ($e) => $e->metadata->subgroupDescription)?->metadata?->subgroupDescription) @if($subgroupDescription) <p> {!! Parsedown::instance()->text($subgroupDescription) !!} </p> @endif @endif @foreach($subgroup as $endpoint) @include("scribe::themes.default.endpoint") @endforeach @endforeach @endforeach
